items.title: Scientist dubbed The Bogfather is restoring peatland to fight climate change
items.summary: A childhood fascination with bogs led one Welsh scientist to try and help save the planet.

items.title: ‘A nightmare’: Strugging with the aftermath of Venezuela’s earthquakes
items.summary: Many survivors are sheltering in tents set up in public parks, after twin earthquakes destroyed rows of buildings.
